name: Modify the newly created user

exception.message:
WebDriver was unable to create a new instance of type class org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver
WebDriver reported the following message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure.

testSteps.description: Given click on the "Admin" of Menu Bar

And Modify the user with below details:
| Status |
| Disabled |

Then verify below message
| Message |
| Successfully Updated |

userStory.storyName: Verify the user creation, modification and deletion end to end
userStory.displayName: Verify the user creation, modification and deletion end to end

title: Modify the newly created user
backgroundTitle: let's login into the application as Admin before every scenario
